India.title: BJP leader Nainar Nagenthran condemns police officer for ‘threatening’ Thoothukudi journalists
India.summary: A police officer made aggressive gestures and reportedly threatened journalists in Thoothukudi when they attempted to get the comments of arrested Vilathikulam DMK MLA G.V. Markandayan.

India.title: Parliament Monsoon Session Day 2 highlights: Both Houses adjourned for the day amid Opposition protests
India.summary: LoP Rahul Gandhi along with some Opposition MPs met Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla, urging him to allow a discussion in the House on the “brutality unleashed” on students

India.title: CJP protest in Delhi LIVE: Delhi High Court allows Wangchuk to shift to Medanta Hospital
India.summary: Union Health Minister J.P. Nadda met with doctors in Delhi's Ram Manohar Lohia hospital to enquire about the injured; CJP leader Abhijeet Dipke apologises to supporters who were 'brutally beaten' by police

India.title: Woman, two daughters killed in house fire at Delhi's Lodhi Colony
India.summary: At 10.21 a.m. Delhi Fire Services received a call informing about fire in a residential building in south Delhi's Lodhi Road

India.title: GBA engineer assaulted during footpath clearance drive near Shivajinagar, five persons detained
India.summary: Authorities said all those involved in the attack will be booked under Section 307 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), which deals with attempt to murder

India.title: China conducts rare live-fire drill inside Japan's claimed EEZ
India.summary: China conducted a live-fire naval drill within Japan's claimed exclusive economic zone. Tokyo lodged a diplomatic protest, citing potential navigation dangers and safety concerns. Beijing dismissed Japan's protest, disputing the legal basis for the EEZ claim. This exercise is…

India.title: Supreme Court frees Kerala Waqf Board from State official ‘supervision’
India.summary: A three-judge Bench headed by CJI Surya Kant passed the order while hearing the Board’s appeal against an interim order of the Kerala High Court on July 15

India.title: Gujarat flags off 139 new buses for tribal students under Birsa Munda transport scheme
India.summary: The buses have been introduced jointly by the Tribal Development Department and the Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation (GSRTC) at a cost of ₹33.84 crore

India.title: Trinamool factions, Congress plan show of strength in Kolkata on Martyrs’ Day
India.summary: Each group claims to be the ‘original’ flagbearer of Martyrs’ Day; all three meetings have been arranged within a 3 km radius; senior leaders have been trying to pull in crowds

India.title: 'Don't Drag Us Into It': Delhi High Court On Plea Alleging Use Of Force On Students
India.summary: The court refused to urgently list a petition concerning the Delhi Police's use of excessive force" against students who took part in the Cockroach Janta Party's protest march to parliament on Monday.

Nepal.title: Foreign study costs outpace growth in Nepal’s service exports
Nepal.summary: Education spending abroad has become the biggest drain on Nepal’s service trade balance, outweighing gains from tourism and other exports.

Nepal.title: Nepal showcases fashion talent at South Asian summit in Sri Lanka
Nepal.summary: Designers Bini Bajracharya and Mukta Shrestha represented Nepal at the regional event, showcasing Nepali craftsmanship and design.

Nepal.title: ‘Nepali cinema needs new stories, not recycled formulas’
Nepal.summary: From theatre to film, actor Jiwan Jung Basnyat on casting and the need for Nepali film industry to take creative risks.

Nepal.title: Search underway for 14 women missing in Shuklaphanta National Park
Nepal.summary: The women entered the protected area on Sunday to collect wild mushrooms but had not returned by Monday morning.

Nepal.title: Real estate revenue hits three-year high as buyers rush before tax hike
Nepal.summary: Revenue climbed to Rs60.74 billion in 2025-26 as buyers rushed to complete deals before higher capital gains tax rates and renewed land subdivision restrictions took effect.

Nepal.title: Police cane supporters of India’s cockroach movement as thousands gather for march
Nepal.summary: Police block march to parliament as hunger-striking activist Sonam Wangchuk sets conditions to end his fast and protesters demand action over examination paper leaks.

Nepal.title: Landslides and floods block nine highways
Nepal.summary: Key road links across Koshi and Bagmati provinces have been shut or partially reopened as authorities warn travellers to check road conditions before setting out.

Nepal.title: How Sonam Wangchuk became the face of India’s Gen Z protest movement
Nepal.summary: The education reformer and environmental activist has emerged as the unlikely leader of a youth movement challenging Narendra Modi's government over examination paper leaks, with his hunger strike drawing nationwide support.

Nepal.title: Cervical cancer screening in Kathmandu finds 90 women positive for HPV
Nepal.summary: While the HPV vaccine included in the routine immunisation list targets types 16 and 18, recent screening shows infections with multiple HPV types, including those not covered by the vaccine.

Nepal.title: Justice remains elusive for Saptari couple caught in usury trap
Nepal.summary: An elderly couple say they repaid nearly Rs1.6 million on loans worth Rs480,000, but their mortgaged land remains out of reach.
